description: This video explains Binance Pay, a user-to-user crypto payment service available on the Binance app. It covers how to set up and use Binance Pay for sending and receiving cryptocurrencies like BTC and BNB.
topic_summary: Learn about Binance Pay, its features, and how to use it for secure, contactless transactions. The video details the setup process, making payments, and receiving payments using QR codes and PayID. [t=3:92] [t=118:48]
